title: Release ArchMap v0.3.0
description: Prepare, verify, tag, publish, and announce the Topology feature release.
decision_notes: Topology is a new base view, so the release increments the minor version from 0.2.1 to 0.3.0.
Generated AOF runtime snapshots remain untracked and are excluded from the release.
The release includes Topology, zone/subgraph authoring guidance, and curated sample improvements.
